Index.title: Nikos K. Klapsinos, MD | Cardiologist Rethymno
Index.hero_subtitle: Your heart health is our priority. Certified private clinic located opposite the Rethymno General Hospital.
Index.install_desc: Our platform supports Offline mode! Tap "Add to Home Screen" in your browser settings (Safari/Chrome) for instant access to first aid protocols without Internet.

FirstAid.title: Smart First Aid Kit
FirstAid.subtitle: Search symptoms or select an emergency. Call 166 or 112 immediately in life-threatening cases.

clinical.title: Clinical Exam & ECG
clinical.desc: A comprehensive physical assessment, blood pressure check, detailed medical history, and Electrocardiogram (ECG).

triplex.title: Echocardiogram (Triplex)
triplex.desc: High-resolution ultrasound imaging of your heart's structure and function in real time.

dioisofageio.title: Transesophageal Echocardiogram
dioisofageio.desc: Specialized ultrasound for superior, detailed cardiovascular imaging.

holter.title: Holter Monitor
holter.desc: 24 to 48-hour continuous ambulatory ECG tracking to detect elusive arrhythmias.

stress.title: Stress Test
stress.desc: Treadmill stress testing to evaluate myocardial ischemia and cardiovascular performance.

About.title: Nikos K. Klapsinos, MD
About.bio: Dr. Nikos K. Klapsinos is a specialized Cardiologist, providing world-class cardiovascular medicine in Rethymno, Crete. Our clinic, located opposite the General Hospital, utilizes modern diagnostic tools combined with a deeply personalized philosophy of care to ensure your heart is always in the right hands.

Contact.title: Contact & Location
Contact.address: Trantalidou 8 (opposite Rethymno General Hospital), Rethymno 74132, Crete, Greece

Footer.brand_subtitle: Advanced, state-of-the-art cardiovascular care located in the heart of Rethymno, Crete. Serving locals and tourists with excellence and compassion.
Footer.disclaimer: Medical Disclaimer: In case of severe emergency, contact 112 or 166 immediately.

DietKit.title: Smart Diet & Prevention App
DietKit.subtitle: Select your medical profile to receive indicative dietary guidelines and recommended preventive tests.
DietKit.disclaimer: The following dietary tips are strictly indicative. A specialized plan requires guidance from a Doctor and a Clinical Dietitian.
